message:
✨ acmm: enrich Current Level card with why + how to level up (#8434)

Adds two compact sections between the gauge and the level list:

1. 'Why move to L{n+1}?' — quotes the transition trigger from the
   paper (italic, one sentence) then explains what the next level
   unlocks in plain terms (role name + first sentence of the
   characteristic). Keeps the paper's voice without being academic.

2. 'How to level up' — points to the Feedback Loop Inventory card
   and explains both paths: single-item agent help (Ask agent for
   help on any criterion) and batch (Help me reach L{n} button).
   Also notes the manual path for users without agents.

Doesn't repeat the Your Role card's slider/charts content — the
Current Level card stays focused on 'where am I, why should I move,
and how do I start.'

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -66,9 +66,10 @@ export function ACMMLevel() { const nextLevel = level.level < MAX_LEVEL ? level.level + 1 : null const nextRequired = nextLevel ? level.requiredByLevel[nextLevel] ?? 0 : 0 const nextDetected = nextLevel ? level.detectedByLevel[nextLevel] ?? 0 : 0 + const nextLevelDef = nextLevel ? ALL_LEVELS.find((l) => l.n === nextLevel) : null return ( -
+
{repo}
-
+
@@ -106,6 +107,35 @@ export function ACMMLevel() {
+ {/* Why move up — transition trigger from the paper. Kept short: + one quoted sentence + what the next level unlocks. */} + {nextLevel && nextLevelDef && ( +

Why move to L{nextLevel}?
+

+ {level.nextTransitionTrigger} +

+

+ At L{nextLevel} {nextLevelDef.name} you become {/^[aeiou]/i.test(nextLevelDef.role) ? 'an' : 'a'} {nextLevelDef.role} — {nextLevelDef.characteristic.split('.')[0].toLowerCase()}. +

+
+ )} + + {/* How to level up — practical pointers to the other two cards. */} + {nextLevel && ( +
+
How to level up
+

+ Check the Feedback Loop Inventory below for missing criteria at L{nextLevel}. + Click Ask agent for help on any item to have an AI agent add it, or use the + {' '}Help me reach L{nextLevel} button at the bottom to tackle them all at once. +

+

+ No agent? Add the files manually — each criterion shows the exact detection pattern to match. +

+
+ )} +

- Next level progress + Progress to L{nextLevel} {nextDetected}/{nextRequired}
